# Support

This is a community-owned project built by whoever shows up. Here's how to get help:

## Documentation

- [README.md](../README.md) — Project overview and quick start
- [unbounded/WELCOME.md](../unbounded/WELCOME.md) — Guided tour of UNBOUNDED
- [termite-projects/MASTER-PROJECT-SUMMARY.md](../termite-projects/MASTER-PROJECT-SUMMARY.md) — Termite Research overview
- [unbounded/GOVERNANCE.md](../unbounded/GOVERNANCE.md) — How we govern ourselves

## Community

- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/Puronbo/termite-biotech-and-unbounded/discussions) — Ask questions, share ideas, start conversations
- [Open a discussion](https://github.com/Puronbo/termite-biotech-and-unbounded/discussions/new/choose) — Not sure where to start? Open a discussion, not an issue.

## Issues

- [Bug report](https://github.com/Puronbo/termite-biotech-and-unbounded/issues/new?template=bug_report.md) — Report a bug
- [Feature request](https://github.com/Puronbo/termite-biotech-and-unbounded/issues/new?template=feature_request.md) — Suggest an idea

## Security

For security vulnerabilities, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) and report confidentially.

## Contributing

See [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) for how to get involved.
